Name: default_AIStandardInfoBank
Description: Determines the parameters for enemy AI.

Fields.Name: Recognition Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which characters are recognized. In metres.

Fields.Name: Horziontal Recognition Angle
Fields.Description: The horziontal angle for the recognition check. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Vertical Recognition Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical angle for the recognition check. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Territory Distance
Fields.Description: The distance of the owner's territory. If the recognized character leaves this distance, the owner will return to its initial position.

Fields.Name: Intimidation Probability before Attack
Fields.Description: The probability of intimidation before an attack.

Fields.Name: Force Initial Intimidation
Fields.Description: If ON, always intimidate the player when recognizing the player for the first time.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Distance
Fields.Description: The distance when attacking with this attack slot.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Margin
Fields.Description: The distance to move between attacks with this attack slot. In metres.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Frequency
Fields.Description: The frequency of this attack slot.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Type
Fields.Description: The type of attack this attack slot is.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Minimum Delay
Fields.Description: The minimum delay after an attack that another one can occur. In frames.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Maximum Delay
Fields.Description: The maximum delay after an attack that another one can occur. In frames.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Allowed Angle
Fields.Description: The allowable angle between the line of sight and the direction vector toward the target. If within this angle, then the attack will proceed. In degrees.

Fields.Description: The distance when attacking with this attack slot.

Fields.Description: The minimum delay after an attack that another one can occur. In frames.
